name: Atlantis City Map
description: The known city map of Atlantis. Add your actual map image at assets/maps/atlantis-city-map.webp.

pins.title: Trident Palace
pins.description: The seat of King Aurelion Veyrath IX and the political heart of Atlantis.

pins.title: Tidewarden Headquarters
pins.description: The command center of the Tidewardens.

pins.title: Silvered Market
pins.description: The commercial center of Atlantis and the party's first patrol route.

pins.title: Barracks of Tides
pins.description: Recruit housing where the party awakens at the beginning of the campaign.

pins.title: Coral Gardens
pins.description: A peaceful district for recreation, memorials, and public gathering spaces.

pins.title: The Deep Gate
pins.description: The main entrance to Atlantis and the boundary between the city and the wider ocean.

name: Silvered Market
description: The bustling market district where the party completed its first patrol and met Nella and Kella Tidehopper.

pins.title: Main Entrance
pins.description: The northern entrance to the Silvered Market.

pins.title: Central Plaza
pins.description: The heart of the market where citizens gather beneath drifting lanterns.

pins.title: Artisan's Row
pins.description: Home to Coral Forge Armory, Current & Cog Tinkery, Mooncurrent Tailors, and Pearlroot Apothecary.

pins.title: Information Kiosk
pins.description: A coral notice board used for announcements, missing property reports, and community notices.

pins.title: Algae Lantern Garden
pins.description: A quiet glowing garden where Nella sometimes feeds fish.

pins.title: The Gilded Kelp
pins.description: Atlantis' popular tavern filled with light, laughter, music, and questionable decisions.

name: Drowned Ward Tunnels
description: The underwater tunnels beneath the Drowned Ward where the party investigated Nella's disappearance.

pins.title: Tunnel Entrance
pins.description: The route into the old maintenance tunnels.

pins.title: Collapsed Passage
pins.description: Damaged tunnel stone and debris block portions of the route.

pins.title: Old Maintenance Chamber
pins.description: A forgotten chamber beneath the Drowned Ward.
